subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant of the Abhá Beauty! Thy letter was received. As to the matter of the handmaiden of God, Hakímih Khánum [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده باوفای جمال ابهی نامه شما ملاحظه گردید اما قضیه امة الله حکیمه خاتون
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
